name: Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (7 oz each) tuna, drained and flaked
1 package (8 oz) elbow macaroni, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat.
2. Stir in corn starch, salt, and pepper until smooth.
3. Remove from heat; gradually stir in milk until smooth.
4. Bring to boil over medium heat, stirring constantly, and boil 1 minute.
5. Add onion.
6. Place remaining ingredients in greased 2-quart casserole.
7. Stir in corn starch mixture.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until heated through. Makes 6 servings.
